---
name: Integration request
about: Request a new framework integration (LangChain, CrewAI, etc.)
title: '[INTEGRATION] '
labels: integration, good first issue
assignees: ''
---

## Framework
Name and link to the framework.

## Sovereignty posture
- Company: [e.g. deepset GmbH, Berlin, Germany]
- Jurisdiction: [EU / US / other]
- CLOUD Act exposure: [yes / no / conditional]
- Air-gap capable: [yes / no]
- Runtime network calls: [none / optional / required]

## Why it belongs in Sentinel
How does this integration help regulated organisations?

## Are you willing to implement it?
- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] I can help review but not implement
- [ ] I just want to track demand
